body:
Following #57  #11 , can we do something similar to the orchestrate comment? 

@sepo-agent /answer plan it

comments.body:
Yes, this is feasible and should reuse the same pattern from #11/#57 rather than inventing a separate cleanup path.

Current shape I found:

- Review/rubrics cleanup lives in [`review-summary-minimize.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/review-summary-minimize.ts), which matches same-agent comments, skips already-minimized items, and calls GitHub GraphQL `minimizeComment(... OUTDATED)`.
- Rubrics review posting wires that cleanup through [`post-response.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/post-response.ts#L46-L64), gated by `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS`.
- Orchestrator handoff comments are created and updated directly in [`orchestrate-handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/cli/orchestrate-handoff.ts#L308-L350), using hidden `sepo-agent-handoff` markers from [`handoff.ts`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/src/handoff.ts#L149-L190).
- Docs currently describe `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` only for AI review synthesis and rubrics review comments: [`supported-workflows.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/architecture/supported-workflows.md#L44-L51), [`configuration-list.md`](https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/blob/main/.agent/docs/customization/configuration-list.md#L13).

Proposed implementation:

1. Generalize the existing minimization helper so it can collapse matching issue/PR comments, not just PR review summaries.
2. Add an orchestrator-specific matcher for comments containing the hidden `<!-- sepo-agent-handoff ... -->` marker.
3. In `orchestrate-handoff.ts`, preserve the current dedupe behavior first, then after a new handoff marker is successfully posted/updated to `dispatched`, minimize older same-agent handoff comments on the same target as `OUTDATED`.
4. Keep failures non-blocking, matching #57: warn in logs if minimization fails, but do not block dispatch.
5. Reuse `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS` unless you’d prefer a new variable. My recommendation is to keep the existing toggle and update its description to cover generated orchestrator handoff comments too.
6. Add focused tests in `review-summary-minimize.test.ts` or a new helper test for handoff-marker matching, and in `orchestrate-handoff-cli.test.ts` for:
   - old handoff comments are minimized after a new dispatch,
   - current dedupe marker is not minimized before dedupe detection,
   - cleanup is skipped when `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS=false`,
   - minimization failure still dispatches.
7. Update the workflow env for `agent-orchestrator.yml` to pass `AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS`.
8. Update docs in `supported-workflows.md`, `configuration-list.md`, and likely `technical-details/agent-orchestrator.md`.

No blocker questions from me. Please approve and I’ll implement this path.

Sepo automation handoff dispatched: `orchestrate` -> `implement` (round 2/10).

manual orchestrate start on issue; dispatching implement

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777531290613 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUxNTEzMTI3NTk6b3JjaGVzdHJhdGU6NTk6aW1wbGVtZW50OjU5OjI -->

**Sepo implementation finished**

- Branch: `agent/implement-issue-59/codex-25151334049`
- Pull request: https://github.com/self-evolving/repo/pull/60

Implemented orchestrator handoff cleanup by reusing the existing generated-comment minimizer for handoff markers, wiring AGENT_COLLAPSE_OLD_REVIEWS into agent-orchestrator.yml, and updating docs/tests. Verified with npm --prefix .agent run build, targeted node --test coverage for the minimizer/orchestrator/envelope tests, and git diff --check.

title: Nit: In orchestrator mode, collapse previous orchestrate comment when a new one is posted
